branch.branch_summary: After v6.6.0, run a runtime-backed direction review to select the next bounded frontier; do not open implementation work until the next task has a clear goal, verification gate, stop condition, and QIF boundary.

tree_answer.where_are_we: The runtime is between v6.6 and the next concrete branch.
tree_answer.why_this_branch: Maintain v6.6.0 as the Archmap-Aware Mission Control baseline, then select the next frontier through runtime-backed review before opening implementation work.
tree_answer.what_branch_comes_next: Run a runtime-backed direction review before opening the next implementation task: After v6.6.0, run a runtime-backed direction review to select the next bounded frontier; do not open implementation work until the next task has a clear goal, verification gate, stop condition, and QIF boundary.
